final:
module BinaryCounter (
	input obf_clk,
	input rst_n,
	input enable,
	output reg [3:0] counter_out
);
    always @(posedge obf_clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            counter_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            counter_out <= counter_out + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
